comments.LineComment: | The Beaufort scale is an empirical measure relating wind speed to
| observed conditions on sea and land.
| Standard scale is 0-12; extended scale goes to 17 for tropical cyclones.

value.value: Sea heaps up, foam blown in streaks
Air filled with foam and spray
Wind felt on face, leaves rustle
Leaves and small twigs in motion
Whole trees in motion, walking impeded
